home.welcomeFirst: Hello, it's great to have you here. Today we'll review how your health is doing, calmly and without rush.
home.welcomeReturningNamed_one: Hello again, {{name}}. Your last visit was 1 day ago.
home.welcomeReturningNamed_other: Hello again, {{name}}. Your last visit was {{days}} days ago.
home.welcomeReturningNamedToday: Hello again, {{name}}. Your last visit was today.
home.welcomeReturningAnon_one: Hello again. Your last visit was 1 day ago.
home.welcomeReturningAnon_other: Hello again. Your last visit was {{days}} days ago.
home.welcomeReturningAnonToday: Hello again. Your last visit was today.
home.privacyNotice: Your data is stored only on this device. Nothing is sent to the internet.

hasDraft.title: You have a measurement in progress
hasDraft.subtitle: You can continue where you left off or start fresh.

basicForm.title: First, tell me a little about yourself
basicForm.subtitle: These details help me understand your body and personalize your results.

summary.title: Before we continue, let's review some details.
summary.body: I've marked them in red for you. When they're correct, they'll turn green.

firstName.label: Your first name
firstName.help: Just your given name, no surnames.

birthDate.label: When did you arrive in the world? Your birth date
birthDate.help: We use this to calculate your age, no need to type it.

age.label: Age
age.help: We calculate it from your birth date, so you don't have to worry.

wristContexture.label: Your wrist frame
wristContexture.intro: Wrap your wrist with the thumb and middle finger of your other hand. Choose based on what you see.

errors.required: Oops, it looks like this detail slipped by. Would you share it with me?
errors.tooShort: It's a bit too short. Could you write it in full?
errors.tooLong: It's too long. Could you shorten it a little?
errors.invalidChars: Only letters, spaces and hyphens, please.
errors.needsLetters: It needs to contain at least one letter.
errors.invalidNumber: Hmm, that number doesn't add up. Could you double-check it?
errors.invalidDate: Hmm, that date doesn't add up. Could you double-check it?
errors.ageOutOfRange: To use this app you need to be between 10 and 120 years old. Is the date correct?
errors.heightOutOfRange: That height is outside what I expected (100–230 cm). Could we double-check it?
errors.futureDate: The birth date cannot be in the future.

high.title: Great to see you again!
high.body: I found your previous records, {{name}}. Let's continue with your measurements.

partial.title: I found similar data
partial.body: Are you {{name}}? If so, I'll add your measurement to their history. If not, let's continue as new.

metricsForm.title: Now, today's measurements
metricsForm.subtitle: If you don't have an exact value for any of them, don't worry. Leave it empty and we'll go on with the ones you do have.

summary.title: Before we continue, let's review some measurements.
summary.body: I've marked them in red for you. When they're correct, they'll turn green.

notes.label: Notes (optional)
notes.help: Anything you want to remember about this measurement (medication, mood, observations, etc.).
notes.placeholder: For example: ‘Started swimming twice a week. Feeling more energetic.’

weight.label: Your current weight
weight.help: In kilograms, as accurate as possible.

bmi.label: Your BMI
bmi.help: Shown by your scale or health app. Write down the exact value your device gives you.

bodyFatPct.label: Body fat percentage
bodyFatPct.help: Shown by your smart scale or body composition exam.

muscleMassPct.label: Muscle mass percentage
muscleMassPct.help: Shown by your scale or body composition exam.

calories.label: Calories you consume per day
calories.help: An estimate is fine, it doesn't need to be exact.

bioAge.label: Your biological age
bioAge.help: What your body indicates based on your latest analysis. Not your ID age.

visceralFat.label: Visceral fat level
visceralFat.help: From your scale or bioimpedance. Integer number.

errors.required: Oops, it looks like this detail slipped by. Would you share it with me?
errors.invalidNumber: Hmm, that number doesn't add up. Could you double-check it?
errors.outOfRange: That value is outside what I expected ({{min}}–{{max}}). Is it correct?
errors.weightOutOfRange: Weight is usually between 20 and 300 kg. Is it correct?
errors.bmiOutOfRange: BMI is usually between 10 and 60. Is it correct?
errors.bodyFatOutOfRange: Body fat % is usually between 3 and 50%. Is it correct?
errors.muscleOutOfRange: Muscle % is usually between 10 and 70%. Is it correct?
errors.caloriesOutOfRange: Daily calories are usually between 800 and 6000. Is it correct?
errors.bioAgeOutOfRange: Biological age is usually between 10 and 100 years. Is it correct?
errors.visceralOutOfRange: Visceral fat goes from 1 to 30. Is it correct?

discardConfirm.title: Leave without saving?
discardConfirm.body: If you leave now, the data you entered will be lost. Do you still want to return to the home screen?

results.title: Your results
results.subtitle: We compare your values with the healthy ranges for your age and gender. Green is fine, yellow asks for attention, and red is worth checking soon.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.bmrHint: Minimum calories your body burns at rest.

water.label: Recommended water
water.hint: Based on your current weight ({{weight}} kg), drinking about {{liters}} liters of water a day helps your body work well. If it's hot or you do more physical activity than usual, add a little more. Small frequent sips work better than a lot at once.
water.methodology: This suggestion uses the 35 milliliters per kilogram of body weight formula, a reference used by the European Food Safety Authority (EFSA) and the U.S. Institute of Medicine (IOM). It's a gentle starting point: if your physical activity or the climate change, you can adjust a bit upward.

summary.allNormal: Excellent, all your parameters are within the healthy ranges. Keep taking such good care of yourself.
summary.fewWarnings: Almost everything looks great. There are a couple of values worth paying attention to.
summary.manyWarnings: Most of your parameters are on the right track. A few would benefit from a little more attention.
summary.hasAlerts_one: We detected one value outside the ideal range. It's important that you review it with a health professional.
summary.hasAlerts_other: We detected {{count}} values outside the ideal range. It's important that you review them with a health professional.
summary.mixed_one: You have a mostly healthy picture, but there's one value worth reviewing soon.
summary.mixed_other: You have a mostly healthy picture, but there are {{count}} values worth reviewing soon.

message.normal: Your weight is within the healthy range for your wrist frame.
message.warning: Your weight is a bit outside the ideal range for your wrist frame.
message.alert: Your weight is well outside the range for your wrist frame.

bmi.label: BMI
bmi.tooltip: The Body Mass Index relates your weight to your height. It's a widely used general reference, but it doesn't distinguish muscle from fat, which is why we pair it with other metrics.

bodyFatPct.label: Body fat %
bodyFatPct.tooltip: It measures what proportion of your total weight is fat. A healthy percentage depends on your age and gender, which is why the reference range adjusts automatically to your case.

muscleMassPct.label: Muscle mass %
muscleMassPct.tooltip: It indicates what proportion of your weight is muscle. It usually rises with strength training and falls with sedentary habits. It complements the body fat percentage.

calories.label: Calories
calories.tooltip: The Basal Metabolic Rate is the minimum energy your body needs at rest to keep vital functions running (breathing, circulation, thinking). It's not what you should eat in a day: it's the floor, not the ceiling.

bioAge.label: Biological age
bioAge.tooltip: An estimate of how your body is functioning compared to the average for your chronological age. It's calculated by combining several metrics, so it doesn't depend on a single value.

visceralFat.label: Visceral fat
visceralFat.tooltip: This is the fat that accumulates around your internal organs. At high levels it's associated with greater cardiovascular risk, which is why we keep a close eye on it.

modal.title: Would you like to save your data?
modal.askBody: If you save it, we can show you your history next time. If not, you can go back to the home without saving.
modal.savedBody: Your measurement is now recorded. Whenever you want, you can return to the home screen to review your history.
modal.saveError: Oops, something didn't go as expected while saving. Shall we try again?
modal.exportQuestion: In which format would you like to download your record?
modal.exportScopeQuestion: What would you like to download?
modal.comingSoonBody: Excel and PDF export will be enabled in upcoming phases.
modal.exportError: The file couldn't be generated. Check that your device has space and let's try again.

history.title: Your history
history.subtitle: Here are all your measurements, {{name}}. Each one tells a story.

summary.empty: This is your first measurement with us. The next time you come back, you'll see how you've progressed here.
summary.one: This is your first measurement with us. The next time you come back, you'll see how you've progressed here.
summary.few: Look, we already have {{count}} records for you. Each one tells a story.
summary.many: You have {{count}} measurements with us. Review how your values have changed over time.

history.noRecords: There are no saved measurements yet. Go back to the main screen to record the first one.
history.notFound: We couldn't find this client's data.

toast.exportSuccess: Done, file is in your downloads folder
toast.exportError: We couldn't generate the file. Please try again.

login.title: Admin area only
login.subtitle: Enter your password to continue.
login.error: Those credentials don't match. Please check them.
login.lockedPrefix: Too many attempts. Try again in
login.noPasswordConfigured: No password is configured. Check the .env file.

shell.title: Admin panel
shell.logoutConfirmBody: You'll leave the panel. You can come back anytime.

search.empty: I didn't find clients with that name. Try another or press «View all».
search.noClients: There are no registered clients yet. When someone uses the app, they'll show up here.

detail.noRecords: This client doesn't have any measurements yet.

deleteClient.title: Delete {{name}}?
deleteClient.body: This deletes the client and all their measurements ({{count}}). You'll have 5 seconds to undo.

wipe.title: Erase all data
wipe.subtitle: This deletes ALL clients, measurements, and drafts. It cannot be undone.
wipe.stats_one: {{clients}} client and {{records}} measurement will be erased.
wipe.stats_other: {{clients}} clients and {{records}} measurements will be erased.
wipe.typePrompt: To confirm, type DELETE ALL in uppercase:
wipe.typeMismatch: You must type DELETE ALL exactly.
